processMaps.summary: Transfer Execution main routine and process details.
Lineage trace process for audit, debugging, and origin lookup.

views.name: Transfer Execution Main
views.purpose: Main routine state machine: create execution context, prepare Work Items that carry decision materials, skip transfer for duplicate-ignore or no-op cases, branch by transfer model when transfer is needed, run ordered transfer processes, record results, and finish.

views.name: Create Transfer Run detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Create Transfer Run process creates the execution context.

views.name: Prepare Work Item detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Prepare Work Item process fixes Dirty Keys as Work Items, excludes already processed Dirty Keys, and attaches the decision materials needed to choose the transfer-model route and route-side effects.

views.name: Red Transfer - insert detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Red Transfer - insert process writes a reversing red destination row and records lineage when the Work Item materials satisfy Red Transfer.

views.name: Black Transfer - insert detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Black Transfer - insert process writes a black destination row and records lineage when the Work Item materials satisfy Black Insert Transfer.

views.name: Physical Delete Transfer - execute detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Physical Delete Transfer - execute process physically deletes a destination row when the Work Item materials satisfy Physical Delete Transfer.

views.name: Black Transfer - upsert detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Black Transfer - upsert process inserts or updates a destination row when the Work Item materials satisfy mutable Black Transfer.

views.name: Record Processing Result detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Record Processing Result process records processing results in Dirty Key Processing for duplicate-transfer prevention.

views.name: Trace Origin From Destination Row flow
views.purpose: Flow view for tracing the origin of a destination row through a Lineage match and an origin trace query result.

views.name: Resolve Lineage Match detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Resolve Lineage Match process starts from a destination row with Lineage and produces a Matched Lineage Row.

views.name: Build Origin Context detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Build Origin Context process uses a Matched Lineage Row to gather source key, execution context, transfer setting, and destination-link context into an Origin Trace View query result.

views.name: Trace Destination Row History flow
views.purpose: Flow view for tracing the history of a destination row through a history context and a destination row history query result.

views.name: Resolve Lineage History detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Resolve Lineage History process starts from a destination row with Lineage and produces a Lineage History Key List for related lineage and destination rows in the same source-key and destination-link context.

views.name: Build Destination Row History View detail
views.purpose: Detailed view of how the Build Destination Row History View process uses a Lineage History Key List and destination table rows to build a read-only destination row history query result.
